headline: Northern Trust (NTRS) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's Why
summary: Northern Trust (NTRS) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

headline: Northern Trust Selected by $15 Billion Sacramento County Employees’ Retirement System for Asset Servicing
summary: CHICAGO, April 23, 2026--Northern Trust will provide asset servicing and outsourced solutions to SCERS, including global custody, securities lending and accounting services.

headline: Vertiv, Northern Trust And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: Vertiv shares fell 2.3% to close at $305.14 on Wednesday, and Northern Trust shares declined 2.3% to close at $167.83.
